programme.title: Nova: Touching the Asteroid

programme.title: The Age of Nature: Understanding

programme.desc: Tiny and Buddy visit a special dinosaur family; Buddy is excited to play with Annie.

programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old
programme.desc: Just after Stan's tenth birthday, his worldviews start to change and so do his friendships.

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: Hummels and Heroin
programme.desc: Beloved entertainers are being cut down in their prime due to massive overdoses of opiates. Stan is about to be exposed as the source of the illegal drugs.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one. When Stan refuses to vote for the ridiculous choices, Puff Daddy shows up and tells him to 'vote or die.'

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: October 21, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: October 21, 2020

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard

programme.title: The Closer: Blood Money

programme.title: The Closer: Red Tape
programme.desc: Sgt. Gabriel shoots a murder suspect he is certain is armed and firing at him, but the evidence doesn't seem to match up. A Force Investigator is sent in to check things out, interfering with Brenda's murder investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Walking Back the Cat
programme.desc: Brenda and her squad are temporarily deputized into the FBI when a missing persons case turns into a full-blown murder investigation involving drug trafficking at gay dance parties.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Back to the DeLorean: Time Machine Rescue
programme.desc: Back to the Future's iconic DeLorean Time Machine is one of the most famous cars in film history, but after decades on display, it needs a restoration. Producer Bob Gale, Universal Studios and a group of dedicated fans try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: Gold Rush: New Season Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get a sneak peak at the new season of Gold Rush.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.desc: Back to the Future's iconic DeLorean Time Machine is one of the most famous cars in film history, but after decades on display, it needs a restoration. Producer Bob Gale, Universal Studios and a group of dedicated fans try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Return of Freddy Dodge
programme.desc: To save his season, Rick drafts a Gold Rush vet and former member of team Hoffman. Chasing a record-breaking goal, Parker orders an unachievable goal. Tony and Monica fire up their wash plant as they battle to beat Parker to the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hoffman's Ghosts
programme.desc: New mine boss Rick is buckling under debt, if he's going to prove himself to his crew he needs to get his first gold weigh. Parker attempts a treacherous river crossing and Tony Beets hits a snag removing a massive piece of his million-dollar dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hazard Pay
programme.desc: Rick needs a quick fix from Freddy Dodge to keep his season on track. Parker races to get his second wash plant running, but struggles. Tony needs to re-float his sunken dredge and turns to a familiar face from the Hoffman crew for a solution.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Stormageddon
programme.desc: Torrential rains hit the Klondike and Parker and Rick battle to save their mining operations from being flooded out. Tony sends son Mike on his first voyage as Captain on his tug the Kid Commando.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Megamorphosis
programme.desc: Parker's biggest wash plant collapses. Rick makes a shocking discovery and asks his dad for help. A crucial piece comes crashing down as Tony dismantles his dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Father's Day
programme.desc: Rick and his dad battle together to open a new cut. Parker struggles with mechanical breakdowns. Tony dismantles his Dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Resurrection
programme.desc: Dean keeps the claim running when the flu brings Parker's operation to its knees. Rick's mechanic Carl is acting weird. Tony hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Devil's Deadline
programme.desc: Rick is forced to ask Tony for help and Parker runs a 24-hour test of his ground and suffers another washplant failure. Tony hauls the final piece of his million-dollar second dredge from Thistle Creek and prepares to rebuild it.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Rick Ness and Freddy Dodge discover an issue with the wash plant, potentially losing Rick thousands in gold. Parker must risk using a dozer to move his biggest wash plant and Tony's daughter Monica battles to keep their dream of a 6000 ounce season alive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Old School Heroes
programme.desc: Rick makes a disastrous mistake that shuts down his claim; Parker threatens a long time member of the crew with demotion and Tony resurrects an ancient wash plant in an attempt to get back in the game.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Wedding Bells and Emergency Operations
programme.desc: Parker tasks Brennan with moving wash plant Big Red in just 24 hours. Rick's crew struggles when someone falls prey to a life-threatening illness. Wedding bells ring in the Yukon as the Beets family prepares for the marriage of Tony's daughter Monica.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Broken Bones
programme.desc: Parker crashes a boat resulting in a terrible injury. Frozen ground and machine failure threaten Rick's season. Tony and family finally rebuild his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Make it Rain
programme.desc: Tony and his family attempt a dangerous crane operation. Rick fights frozen ground. Parker pushes wash plant Sluicifer beyond the limit.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Holding Mom Hostage
programme.desc: When hot-tempered David moved back in with his 93-year-old mother, he quickly filled her home with clutter. Now, the dangerous living conditions, and David's short fuse, have his elderly mom cornered.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Happy Wife, Happy Life?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Capsized Canoe Rescue
programme.desc: An investigation sparks when Warden McDermott discovers an abandoned truck, and a group of paddlers are rescued from their capsized canoe. On "Old Home Day", Warden Demler patrols the ATV trails, and an injured barred owl gets a second chance.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: When Maine's wildlife wanders into human territory, it's game wardens to the rescue. Wardens Marquis and Fitzpatrick try to catch a dumpster-diving bear. A wily woodchuck gives Warden Lounder a run for his money.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: The Good, the Bad, the Smelly
programme.desc: The New Hampshire Conservation Officers are equipped to handle any situation that nature can throw at them, including a dangers timber rattlesnake, and a family of skunks that have been separated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Just One More ...
programme.desc: The rule is clear: one hunter one deer. But some hunters are greedy and the wardens are there to stop them. Plus, a deputy joins his first night-hunting stakeout, LaFlamme searches for an arrow that can help solve a mystery and a family covers up a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The End Is Near
programme.desc: A Facebook post leads the wardens to a gang of poachers, which turns into a manhunt when the ringleader skips bail. The wardens capture a flock of nuisance wild turkeys and search all night for a rabbit hunter lost in the snowy woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A Smartphone with video evidence of a crime leads to a poacher. Two drunken sledders run over a warden and are chased through the woods. Herring hunts down a man that he knows with arrest warrants. LaFlamme helps a herd of deer in distress.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Senior Dog's Decked Out Dorm
programme.desc: A family needs help making their mountain cabin safer for Chickie, a blind senior dog.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Superfly Parrot Palace
programme.desc: With their home doubling as a rescue for dozens of parrots, the Brewer family needs Antonio's help. Antonio helps the family reclaim their kitchen and dining room, and builds a huge geodesic dome to give these colorful birds space to spread their wings.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Football Pup Palace
programme.desc: Turf, the 'wildlife control officer' for the Seahawks, is a working dog with messy habits. Antonio helps his owners turn their laundry room into a fully operational doggy spa and transforms the lackluster backyard into a football-themed doggy paradise.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Condo Cat Creation
programme.desc: Antonio Ballatore transforms a cramped condo with two cats and a rescue dog. The sledgehammers come out as the team knock down kitchen walls, build personalized pet spaces into the stairs and furniture, and install a 20-foot tall cat climbing-wall.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: A Backyard to Drool For
programme.desc: Antonio and team transform a health-hazard yard into a dog-friendly escape, complete with paw-operated drinking fountain and medicinal plants. Inside, a bathroom is transformed into a dog wash and a drool-proof feeding station solves a sticky problem.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Ultimate Manimal Cave
programme.desc: Antonio transforms a cluttered basement housing more than 20 rescued reptiles, mammals and birds into an underground grotto. The team build enclosures into artificial rock walls for the exotic residents and create an entertainment space everyone can use.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Fluffy Fixer Pupper
programme.desc: A family needs help creating a multi-functional space for the bunnies, ferrets, cats and dogs that have taken over their home. Antonio designs elaborate hatches, ramps and tunnels allowing the animals to be in the same room, but remain safely separated.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dog Town, USA
programme.desc: Antonio helps a family who opened their home to neighbourhood dogs create the ultimate backyard dog park with cool, custom dog houses. It has a paddling pool for hot days and a structure of ramps and tunnels to keep everyone entertained and active.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family with two bearded dragons stuck in a tank in mom's bedroom. Antonio's solution: a backyard, temperature-controlled dragon clubhouse with separate self-sustaining tanks, a common climbing area, and a cool hangout spot for the family.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Sig and Jake have a massive falling out, leading to new strategies and new alliances. Josh Harris returns to captain his father's boat. Sean plays dirty, but Wild Bill shows him he's messing with the wrong Captain. With big rewards, come big risks.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: House of Payne: Moving On
programme.desc: Miranda decides she must move on from Calvin.

programme.title: Movie: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials

programme.title: Counting Cars: Snider's Ride
programme.desc: Dee Snider of Twisted Sister stops by Count's Kustoms to have Danny turn his brand new Tesla into a rock 'n' roller's ride. But when strange things start happening, the guys aren't sure if it's blown a fuse or if it's possessed.

programme.title: Counting Cars: El Camino Royale
programme.desc: Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty. But if he's going to flip this ride for a big profit, the Count's Kustoms crew will have to put aside their differences.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Caddylicious
programme.desc: Danny and the team take on a 1967 Caddy for a high-end client. Danny's off friend, Jeff Blando of the band Slaughter, stops by the shop to get the finishing touch on a rock 'n' roll-themed chopper that Danny built for him years ago.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Twisted Chopper
programme.desc: Dee Snider from Twisted Sister drops by the shop to get a new ‘Sugar Bear’ front end put on his Von Dutch chopper. Danny makes a road trip to L.A. to pick up the front end, and hang with his old friend Sugar while he's there.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Low Riding Lincoln

programme.desc: Ryan and Ghetto Bob buy a '67 Pontiac GTO, but Danny might not let it go. Plus, former Guns N' Roses guitarist DJ Ashba drops off his latest super car.

programme.desc: Brann Dailor, drummer for the Grammy-winning heavy metal band Mastodon, brings in his 1970 Cadillac Coupe DeVille for some much-needed Counts Kustoms love.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tommy Lee's Chopper
programme.desc: When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it: the guys who built it, Count's Kustoms. Danny and Ryan take in a cool collection to cheer them up after seeing Tommy's smashed bike.

programme.title: Killing Versace: The Hunt for a Serial Killer

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Stoldt
programme.desc: A missing person case goes cold until a nervous breakdown leads to a confession.

programme.title: Snapped: Shelia Eddy

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Deadly Search for Love
programme.desc: When Utah teen Annie Kasprzak is brutally murdered, one solid lead after another evaporates in a haze of rumors and lies. After a suspect is finally in custody, Annie's family fights to make sure this killer's sentencing is just.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: No Body, No Justice

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Tower of Terror
programme.desc: Fearless technicians battle staggering heights and fierce winds to upgrade a communications tower that keeps millions connected; special access to this dangerous job site reveals what it takes to get the job done.

programme.desc: Maintenance crews at a remote airstrip are exposed to the elements as they keep water-bombing aircraft flying to battle forest fires, and mechanics race against the clock to get transport helicopters to safely shuttle oil rig workers.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stonehenge of the Holy Land
programme.desc: Legends of ancient giants surround a mysterious monument in the Holy Land. A bright pink lake could point to a strange, undiscovered new species. When a young boy disappears in a sand dune, satellite images help with the investigation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist stumbles upon strange symbols scratched into the Kazakhstan Desert. CIA surveillance photographs show what looks like a giant Star of David on the island of Cuba. A lake in the Brazilian rain forest has turned bright pink.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City
programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Siberian Hell Pit
programme.desc: A massive chasm appears in a remote part of the Siberian forest, and locals call it to a gate to the underworld. Images of a nuclear missile launch silo in Montana are being manipulated. A bright green spiral appears in the Persian Gulf.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Riddle in the Ruins
programme.desc: Strange black holes appear near Egypt's ancient pyramids, and new evidence points to a disturbing conclusion. Ruins in Peru suggests that the Inca people knew far more than previously thought. A mysterious red swarm invades a beach in India.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dracula's Tomb
programme.desc: Strange mounds in Transylvania might pinpoint the location of the tomb of the bloodthirsty tyrant believed to have inspired Dracula. A mysterious ancient city is discovered on a coral reef. Images of a plane crash sets off a hunt for a drug lord.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Second Chance at Death
programme.desc: While mourning the death of his wife, Julian falls hard for his much-younger coworker Teresa. For a time, her spunk lifts him out of to his sorrows until a sordid affair plunges him even deeper into the abyss.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Flirting with the Enemy
programme.desc: College freshman Jason Rodriguez finds excitement in his newfound freedom online when he begins dating several girls who pique his interest. But soon after meeting one of them offline, he turns up dead and the identity of his online friends are revealed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: A courthouse brawl after a manslaughter conviction; a woman claims Jesus is her attorney; a man becomes outraged when denied bond; a group text gone wrong; an attorney steals a wallet; a man flees an Ohio courtroom; a salad heist takes a violent turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: A courthouse brawl after a manslaughter conviction; a woman claims Jesus is her attorney; a man becomes outraged when denied bond; a group text gone wrong; an attorney steals a wallet; a man flees an Ohio courtroom; a salad heist takes a violent turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Behind the Closed Door
programme.desc: In a football-crazed town, a star player and a new girl at school end up in a he-said, she-said controversy after a raucous party.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: 36-year old Indle King courts beautiful 18-year old Anastasia Solovieva online. She travels from her home in Kyrgyztan to Seattle to marry him, but her American dream turns into a nightmare when she realizes that Indle is not the man she thought he was.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Final Notice
programme.desc: What do you do when you fear for your life and the person at the end of the 911 line is the one you need protecting from? Two Altadena families are unlucky enough to find out when an LAPD cop moves in next door.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Vicious Voyeur
programme.desc: The killer of a young North Carolina woman keeps police guessing until he slips up and detectives get what they need to put him behind bars.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: End of the Line
programme.desc: When a first-year college co-ed turns up raped and murdered, it takes a freshman cop to beat the odds and catch a killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Dance
programme.desc: When a 16 year-old ballet dancer is assaulted and murdered in her home, Portsmouth, Virginia detectives mine dark family secrets and high school social circles to bring an obsessed killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Nightmare Field
programme.desc: In 2011, Dalene Carlson goes missing, just weeks after relocating to Stockton, California. As investigators search for the missing 23 year-old, a shocking discovery in a nearby cornfield sets them on the trail of a vicious killer.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: American Monster: Appalachian Horror Film
programme.desc: Brian and Randi Trimble are in the throes of newly married life. But when Brian meets the fun-loving Blaine Norris at work, their friendship over Blaine's low-budget horror film takes a dark turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction
programme.desc: Setting the record straight about the most familiar and beloved stories from U.S. history.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America

programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blue Ridge Mountain Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys build a massive, and very complicated, log home high in the Blue Ridge Mountains. To make this unique design work, they create an entirely new kind of notch. They work with a local team of craftsmen to pull off this high-stakes build.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1960 Post and Beam Modern
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Unique Builds
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters unveil their top 10 'Most Unique Builds' from the show.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Trash to Treasure
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters count down their Top 10 Custom pieces of 'Trash" they've turned to "Treasure' as chosen by their fans.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes featured on Carnival Eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: It's A Wonderful Bite
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to California for some holiday magic at Winter Fest OC, where there are lots of treats for all the good boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Dining
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits two fall-tastic fairs for seasonal carnival treats. Fright Nights in West Palm Beach, Florida has some scarily delicious items.

programme.desc: Jordan Andino is checking out the food scene after dark in San Antonio, where his first stop is The Hoppy Monk for rabbit barbacoa tacos. Then he heads to Cullum's Attagirl, an authentic chicken shack dishing out Texas-style fried chicken.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Jordan Andino starts his night in Philadelphia at the Taproom on 19th, learning the secrets behind the city's most popular wings. For dinner, he's off to Lloyd Whiskey Bar in Fishtown.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack

programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Happy Hallowocka! / The Teeth-Chattering Tale of the Haunted Pancakes
programme.desc: During Halloween, Fozzie can't help but be funny when he's supposed to be spooky! When Kermit won't try Miss Nanny's boo-berry pancakes, Summer tells a mysterious Halloween tale.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Bored Identity/ Country Clubbed
programme.desc: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was more like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack
programme.desc: A boy controls a portal with the help of his friends and a monster.

programme.title: The Haunted Hathaways: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: When Ray and Miles agree to help Taylor with her first Halloween party in the Hathaway/Preston house by doing parlour tricks, Louie defiantly turns to a powerful ghost to help really haunt the party.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po teams up with kung-fu masters to take down an old enemy who has a new, deadly weapon.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Fair to Remember/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Main Drain/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs

programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star

programme.title: Bones: The Critic in the Cabernet
programme.desc: When Brenna decides she wants to have a baby, she asks Booth to father the child. The situation stirs up unspoken feelings and unresolved issues between the two, and Booth gets advice from an unlikely source: 'Family Guy's' Stewie Griffin.

programme.title: Bones: The End in the Beginning
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a body is found murdered at a popular nightclub known as 'The Lab.' In an unusual twist of storytelling, Brennan, Booth and the Jeffersonian team take on various roles serving as the nightclub staff.

programme.title: Movie: Captain America: Civil War
programme.desc: When politicians introduce a system of governance to keep the Avengers in check, Captain America tries to shield his friend, Bucky, from the fallout. This puts him at odds with Iron Man, and sets off a catastrophic series of events.

programme.title: Movie: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales

programme.title: Castle: Secret Santa

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Down the Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: After Pride is spotted tracking one of Mayor Hamilton's accomplices, the suspect opens fire on a crowded street before disappearing.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Poetic Justice

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Krewe

programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate the body of a man murdered for the contents of a briefcase. The team suspects secret operatives are at work, and their theories are supported when the liquefied remains of a CIA agent are discovered in a car trunk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'

programme.title: Las Vegas: And Here's Mike With the Weather
programme.desc: Ed and Danny try to track down $2.9 million worth of irregularities in the Montecito's books. Meanwhile, Danny's former marine sergeant visits and Danny offers him a job at the casino. Elsewhere, Mike gets to fulfill his dream of reporting the weather.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Urban Legends
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a car show and NASCAR driver Jimmie Johnson comes to Las Vegas to act as a celebrity judge. Meanwhile, an urban legend comes to life when Danny and Mike discover a man with a missing kidney lying in a bathtub full of ice.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: When Monica's friend Norma finds a finger in the Montecito's new buffet, everyone braces for a lawsuit. However, Norma tells Ed she only wants one thing: Danny. Meanwhile, Sam has a difficult time dealing with a tough customer.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Lyle and Substance
programme.desc: A thief complicates matters when he claims that he met someone who plans to blow up the Montecito. Ed sees this as the thief's ploy to get out of trouble but Danny feels it is necessary to investigate. Meanwhile, Sam hears rumours about the new masseur.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Like a Virgin
programme.desc: Mary finds herself coordinating an extravagant wedding for one of Sam's whales. Meanwhile, Ed and Danny are up against card counters of very unusual sorts, and Mike chases a woman who, unbeknownst to him, is attending a Born Again Virgin conference.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Cash Springs Eternal
programme.desc: Danny and Mike investigate a string of robberies in the residential suites and, in their spare time, pose for a charity beefcake calendar. Meanwhile, Jillian panics when her therapist says her marriage to Ed sets a bad example for Delinda.

programme.title: Las Vegas: All Quiet on the Montecito Front
programme.desc: Even Danny and Delinda are surprised when sparks fly between them. Meanwhile, Montecito owner Casey declares that all department heads must go on a team-building paintball retreat and while there, Casey tries his luck with Mary.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: Ed and Jillian set off on a retreat that proves to be anything but peaceful. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike contend with a suspicious heavy hitter who wants to be a million dollars a hand. Elsewhere, the romance between Delinda and Dr. Derek is heating up.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Fidelity, Security, Delivery
programme.desc: Things heat up at the Montecito when athlete Sasha Cohen stops by. Meanwhile, Delinda provides Dr. Derek with an answer to his marriage proposal. Elsewhere, Danny and Mike help a couple of big gamblers find out if their spouses are being unfaithful.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: One of the ladies at the Montecito is preparing to walk down the aisle. The impending wedding causes old love to resurface and turmoil to brew. It also sets the stage for the mischief and mayhem of bachelor and bachelorette parties.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Father of the Bride Redux
programme.desc: While Ed is attacked by gunmen, an emotional Delinda admits her feelings for Danny. Elsewhere, Sam travels to Hawaii to contend with a whale who won't vacate the Montecito's Hawaiian villas.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Died in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Ed returns from a secret trip to Morocco with shocking news about his past. Meanwhile, Danny and Delinda's romance continues to heat up. Elsewhere, Mike travels to Hawaii to help Sam with her 'whale' problem.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: US Navy vs. UFO

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Escobar's Treasure Sub
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals details of a high-speed chase between a narco sub and the US Coast Guard. With the help of declassified files and cutting-edge military technology, experts investigate if they've found Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship

programme.title: River Monsters: Man-Eating Monster

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
