programme.title: Black-ish: Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes and after talking to Pops, he's resolved to curing himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby Devante hates him, so he enlists Junior and Diane's help.

programme.title: Black-ish: Working Girl
programme.desc: Bow struggles to adjust as she returns to work after maternity leave. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing homework.

programme.title: Black-ish: Inheritance
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town and Ruby has a talk with them about her inheritance. Meanwhile, Bow’s sister Santamonica is also in town and she hires Junior to become her assistant.

programme.title: Black-ish: Bow Knows
programme.desc: Dre is selected to run point on a campaign that focuses on 'The Talk,' which refers to the conversations that Black parents have with their children through the decades to prepare them for the racial bias they may face in the world.

programme.title: Black-ish: Unkept Woman
programme.desc: Dre and Bow's morning routine with the kids is changing now that Bow is taking some time off work. Meanwhile, Junior bonds with Diane now that he is in charge of driving his siblings to school.

programme.title: Black-ish: R-E-S-P-E-C-T
programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Black-ish: White Breakfast
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane get in trouble at school, Dre and Bow have to figure out the right balance of discipline and support so that their kids aren't too afraid of authority nor feel entitled.

programme.title: Black-ish: Things Were Different Then
programme.desc: Dre reluctantly helps Junior plan Pops' 65th birthday party and starts to see his dad's past in a new light. Meanwhile, Bow decides to say "yes" to everything for a whole year and Jack and Diane take advantage of her.

programme.title: Black-ish: North Star
programme.desc: When both Dre and Bow's families show up for Easter, they have to learn to love each other's different cuisines. Meanwhile, Junior tries to organize an Easter egg hunt but Jack and Diane pretend not to be interested to impress their cooler cousins.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Math
programme.desc: When Junior is accepted to Howard and Stanford, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Meanwhile, Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Underwater Worlds
programme.desc: Ancient underwater cities can be found around the globe. Take a look at these cities and examine whether they are remnants of mysterious past civilizations, or even proof of extraterrestrial visitations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Ancient Engineers
programme.desc: Take a look at whether the tools of ancient builders could have come from aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Secret Code
programme.desc: Take a look at possible connections between overall UFO phenomena and information included in ancient texts and decoded from ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Anunnaki Connection
programme.desc: The Sumerians credit their many achievements to The Anunnaki -- giant, winged gods who are only found in ancient cuneiform texts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The New Evidence
programme.desc: In recent years, more new evidence has been revealed than ever before that suggests there was extraterrestrial intervention on Earth in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Wisdom Keepers
programme.desc: The Aborigines of Australia are the oldest, continuously surviving society on Earth. The stories preserved in their oral tradition are said to date back over 60,000 years. Their legends are now being scientifically verified by using geological records.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Animal Agenda
programme.desc: By examining ancient cultures around the world, we find that nearly all revered certain animals and depicted their gods with animal traits.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Replicants
programme.desc: Over 1.5 billion people believe in reincarnation, the belief that a soul can be reborn into a different body after death. Ancient Astronaut Theorists suggest that reincarnation exists and the human body is designed for otherworldly entities.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Da Vinci's Forbidden Codes
programme.desc: Researchers claim there are hidden messages that can be found within the works of Leonardo da Vinci, and other art throughout history, that may reveal an extraterrestrial influence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Trans-Dimensionals
programme.desc: We explore paranormal activity entering our world from other dimensions such as ghosts, angels, and extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable

programme.title: Movie: Ouija: Origin of Evil

programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of King Arthur
programme.desc: Satellites spot a 2,000-year-old structure in Wales, that some suspect has a secret connection to King Arthur.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lake of Blood

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: Masters of Disaster: Rifle Revival
programme.desc: When doomsday comes, an antique rifle could be the key to surviving, and using cutting-edge tech, a team of expert engineers restore it to prep for the apocalypse.

programme.title: Masters of Disaster: Hellfire Havoc
programme.desc: When doomsday comes, an antique flamethrower could be the key to surviving, and using cutting-edge tech, a team of expert engineers restore it to brave the dangers of End Times.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Forbidden Lair of the Yeti
programme.desc: Experts will try to confirm if they've uncovered new evidence of the Yeti using cutting-edge technology on a dangerous expedition to a remote land in the Himalayas to investigate reports of mysterious giant.

programme.title: How It's Made: Glass Paperweights, Road Salt, Nutcrackers, Car Doors
programme.desc: Find out how glass paperweights, road salt, nutcrackers, and car doors are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Battery Tins, Optical Lenses
programme.desc: Find out how battery tins and optical lenses are made.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Out There
programme.desc: Florida teen Karen Slattery is enjoying a night babysitting her neighbors' children, until a violent intruder bursts into the home and vanishes with no trace. With the community on edge, police know they don't have much time before he strikes again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Devastated by personal loss, Heather Kelso finds a fresh start in a familiar place and falls fast for charismatic Gerry DeJesus. But jealousy and other friendships will ultimately drive a deadly wedge straight into the heart of their relationship.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Schooled in Murder
programme.desc: A lunch break devolves into a nightmare for two school secretaries who disappear in broad daylight. One woman is found dead, launching an intense search for her missing friend. As police collect evidence, they suspect the culprit has ties to the school.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Schooled in Murder
programme.desc: A lunch break devolves into a nightmare for two school secretaries who disappear in broad daylight. One woman is found dead, launching an intense search for her missing friend. As police collect evidence, they suspect the culprit has ties to the school.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: Predator at Large: I Will Kill Again
programme.desc: In 1988, 8-year-old April Marie Tinsley is abducted in broad daylight from her Fort Wayne street. Three days later, a jogger makes a heartbreaking discovery in nearby woods which sends cops on a 30 year-long hunt for April's sadistic killer.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Strings Attached
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Chuck Rock meets Beth Williams in Tampa, Florida. When the relationship turns sour, Chuck finds himself drawn into a puzzling web of intrigue and danger and becomes the target of a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Imposter
programme.desc: Barbie Dailey goes looking for love on-line and meets Josh, who appears to be the answer to her prayers. When her friends uncover a dark secret, their fairy-tale romance is consumed by obsession, jealousy and a killer rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Slow Burn
programme.desc: Tammy Lohr is a file clerk who is seduced by a decorated and very married cop. Things heat up when his wife receives an anonymous letter revealing the affair followed by a mysterious fire, a brutal stabbing and an elaborate plot to cover it up.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: Jealousy's a curse but it's never an excuse to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vicious Vixens
programme.desc: An English beauty spars with her boyfriend, a middle-aged woman sacrifices lives for money, and a couple of game players lure an innocent man into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Never Too Young
programme.desc: Youth is no drawback to being a cold-hearted killer. For some young women taking a life is merely child's play. These twisted girls proved you're 'Never Too Young' to be Deadly Women.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends Are Foes
programme.desc: Friendships can give us love and support, unless they turn toxic.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tel Aviv
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals Tel Aviv's most iconic eats, from falafel to hummus to shawarma.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Albuquerque
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Albuquerque's desert gems, from enchiladas to nut rolls.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: World Beyond: The Tyger and the Lamb

programme.title: Soulmates: Little Adventures

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses

programme.desc: Overworked bakery owner is already overwhelmed when her boyfriend sudden breaks up with her, she finds her Christmas spirit when a handsome solider appears.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs Virginia Grudge Night
programme.desc: With so many big-time racers in town, everyone is staying on the streets for some high-stakes grudge racing. Racers compete for money to learn about the road while racers from Cali and North Carolina set up grudge race with a $10,000 pot.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs Virginia Pt 1
programme.desc: Fastest in America is back and bigger than ever, and the season kicks off with the first matchup in the Wildcard Round, where two new teams, Black Sheep Mafia and Team Virginia, battle it out to see who will get a spot in the final eight.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs Virginia Pt 2
programme.desc: The neck-and-neck Wildcard round between Black Sheep Mafia and Team Virginia continues. Axman stops up for his team in a big way while racers of Black Sheep Mafia show they can hold their own, even separate from Team NOLA.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back!: Caught in the Crossfire
programme.desc: Colt discovers a new side of his girlfriend, Angela receives some shocking news from her doctor and Elizabeth asks her dad to pay for a big-ticket item. Later, Paul makes a huge decision for him and his family.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back!: Seeds of Discontent
programme.desc: Elizabeth's family confronts her about Andrei's actions. Jess extends an exotic invite to Colt. Skyla impedes Angela's wedding. Larissa finds out shocking news about Colt. Kalani and Asuelu's upcoming trip is threatened.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A New Family Feud
programme.desc: Chantel's suspicions about Royal's relationship with Angenette grow after talking to Winter and River. As Pedro plans a trip to NYC, Chantel gets big news about her graduation. Sibling secrets come out when tempers flare during a holiday photo shoot.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: More to Love: The Consequences of Truth
programme.desc: Ari struggles with the news about her pregnancy. Deavan and Jihoon make a big move. Yazan starts to question his relationship with Brittany. Melyza reveals her secret to Tim. Armando's family reacts to his engagement to Kenny.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Vacations
programme.desc: Follow a group of penny-pinching Americans who want to hit the open road without breaking open their wallets. Meet a family of four who share one bunk bed at a Dude Ranch and a mom and daughter who wear their clothes and pack food in their carry on.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Shelly
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Shelley has been penny-pinching in Mesa, Ariz. for over 20 years. But Shelley's biggest money-saving challenge is going to be throwing her daughter Ashley's wedding on a $1,000 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Humongous Secret
programme.desc: When Dennis quit drinking, a new compulsion took over, hoarding, and he is now in severe debt. Monte has accumulated a massive, couture-clothing hoard, and destroyed a relationship with her son.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Twenty of Everything
programme.desc: After 30 years of hoarding, Gary's house is so full that he is forced to sleep outside on a makeshift bed.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worse Than a Haunted House
programme.desc: One mother's battle with hoarding is overshadowed by the discovery of her own daughter's compulsion to hold on to things, while another mother is putting her family's unity on the line and her husband's life at risk with her own extreme hoarding problem.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Full of Rats
programme.desc: Property investors get more than they bargained for when the house they purchased is occupied by hoarder Michelle and a rat infestation so bad, it has compromised the building's foundation.

programme.title: Fresh Out Live
programme.desc: Fresh Out Live delivers the most important music and pop culture news of the week and beyond with artist interviews, in-studio performances, album drops, and tour announcements.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Spinning the Globe
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out joints putting their own spin on global flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a culinary dojo ampin' up local specialties like saimin and chile pepper chicken. An outrageous twist on tacos and burritos in Kansas City, Mo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Farm-to-Table Fresh
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing straight from the garden. He checks in on restaurant vets who closed down their original nose-to-tail eatery and opened a farm-to-table vegan joint. Then, a cafe still sourcing local staples and making everything from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Farm-to-Table Fresh
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing straight from the garden. He checks in on restaurant vets who closed down their original nose-to-tail eatery and opened a farm-to-table vegan joint. Then, a cafe still sourcing local staples and making everything from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries out local favourites in New Orleans, Pittsburgh and Albuquerque.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Places You Sent Me
programme.desc: Viewer recommended spots including In Salt Lake City, a 79-year-old diner serving Mile High biscuits and gravy; in New Orleans, a neighbourhood dive puttin' out roast beef po' boys; in Middletown, Conn., a historic dinner that was rebuilt after a fire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Favorites
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Santa Fe and Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Doin' Their Own Thing
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers joints doing things their own unique way, a retro joint making shark tacos. In Chicago, a dinner prepares seafood sixteen different ways, and a chef from Montreal does a Canadian take of Jewish deli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Dishes
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls in for classic meals done right: In Baltimore, a shack steamin' crabs with corn on the cob; In Memphis, the little place with classic southern favorites; And in Minnesota, a strip mall joint doin' home-made Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy checks out BBQ in New Orleans, San Antonio and Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: It's all about the beef on this trip as Guy Fieri pops into a classic diner in Marietta, Georgia, for a taste of what's topping the charts these days. Next, it's on to San Antonio where a carwash-laundromat-kitchen combo is crankin' out killer burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: International Affair
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is circling the globe starting in Salt Lake City where a Vietnamese sandwich shop has exploded with six locations around town. In San Antonio, Texas, a Greek chef is whipping up real-deal Mexican for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Vive La Din Din

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Payback Day

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bankrupt Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, CA. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Broken Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighborhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Good Bones: Outdated Townhome Gets a Funky Facelift
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase an old townhome in the popular Bates-Hendricks neighborhood. After encountering dry rot and termites, the unpredictable roadblocks put a giant dent in their budget and on their attitudes toward the project.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Stately House on Sanders
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are taking on a 2,800-square-foot home with four bedrooms and two bathrooms. While the three-story home is structurally sound, it needs a lot of work to make it ready to sell. Tensions flare when the women have a difference in design style.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chop and Pop
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in the Bates-Hendricks neighborhood and hoping to turn a profit this time around.

programme.title: Good Bones: MJ's Dream Home
programme.desc: Design assistant MJ, and his husband recently bought their first home, and Mina and Karen want to make MJ's dreams a reality. The duo works to blend traditional and modern styles, but MJ may have to compromise to stay in budget.

programme.title: Movie: A Deadly Price for Her Pretty Face
programme.desc: A single mom is kidnapped by two men who wish to sell her on the dark web. While held hostage in a remote cabin, she does whatever it takes to escape her captors and return to her daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Was I Really Kidnapped?
programme.desc: A woman is released from her abductors hands, and goes to police to file a report. While speaking to detectives, her story begins to unravel and she is forced to clear her own name, and identify her attackers.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped by My Father's Killer
programme.desc: A woman finds herself trapped by the man who killed her father and her fiancé. Desperate to survive, she listens to what he has to say, which turns to doubt about what really happened that fateful night.

programme.title: Movie: My Father, My Kidnapper
programme.desc: Casey's mother Jane was abducted as a teenager, and gave birth to her during her captivity. 20 years after the two escaped, local women begin to disappear in an eerily-similar manner. It is up to Casey to face the dark secrets of the past.

programme.desc: The crew is given special permission from the Navajo Nation to investigate Skinwalker Canyon, a place where many residents refuse to enter in fear of encountering shape-shifting creatures.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places: Horror Behind the Walls
programme.desc: A massive 19th-century prison hides a terrifying secret within its walls, a sinister sealed door haunts a British museum and restless residents from centuries past roam a historic village.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places: Ship of Anguished Spirits

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places: Shadow Factory
programme.desc: An abandoned amusement park, a sinister grain silo and a long-shuttered subterranean factory are forever stalked by restless spirits and malevolent creatures.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places: Death Car
programme.desc: A menacing medieval castle, a gilded opera house turned makeshift morgue and a terrifying train car straight out of a nightmare are all the dire domain of the undead.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places: Graveyard of the Atlantic
programme.desc: A monstrous headmistress tortures innocent souls from beyond the grave, a restaurant quakes with ghostly activity and an island is stalked by the sinister spirit of a notorious pirate.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Nopeming Sanatorium
programme.desc: Dakota, Chelsea and Tanner head home to face the horror of their childhood nightmares, Minnesota's most-notorious sanatorium. The team has never had the courage to confront the terror inside until now.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Yorktown Memorial Hospital
programme.desc: The team investigates a Texas hospital with a gruesome history, including a brutal double homicide. Once under the direction of Catholic nuns, the abandoned building's chapel may house a demonic entity with its sights set on Dakota.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Old Montana Prison
programme.desc: Tanner's pick is one of the most terrifying locations the team has ever encountered with entities known for physically attacking, even shanking, unsuspecting visitors. Dakota's greatest fear is physically violent paranormal spirits.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The team returns to a location that, per to Dakota, affected them more than any other. But it's about redemption as they continue their quest to lean into the fear rather than be overcome by it.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Cambria County Jail
programme.desc: Dakota believes that Alex became violently ill on their last fright night due to total isolation and disorientation. She decides to put this theory to the test by bringing the team to the Cambria County Jail, the site of a dungeon used to torture inmates.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Never Before Scene: The Bali Is in Your Court
programme.desc: Jess confronts Aesha over the guests' group photo, while the rest of the boat races to mitigate the impending damage. Tom works to keep a lid on his frustrations, as Malia waits for the other shoe to drop. Aesha makes a decision about her future.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Never Before Scene: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: As the last charter comes to an end, Captain Sandy reckons with a chaotic season while the few remaining chips continue to fall. Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile after a disastrous fight, while Aesha comes to grips with the end of her yachting career.

programme.title: Movie: The Break Up
programme.desc: A woman, who feels neglected and unappreciated by her boyfriend, breaks out of their relationship in an effort to make him miss her. When he misunderstands her intent, war ensues, with both of them refusing to move out of their newly purchased condo.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: A tomboy FBI agent goes undercover in a beauty pageant to prevent a terrorist bombing.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: A tomboy FBI agent goes undercover in a beauty pageant to prevent a terrorist bombing.

programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart becomes 'the face of the FBI' when her popularity botches a mission. When her friend, Miss USA, is kidnapped, Gracie decides to defy her superiors' orders and investigates the case on her own.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live: Below Deck Mediterranean Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Andy Cohen sits down with guests from Bravo's series as well as the entertainment world.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: 1501: Never Before Scene
programme.desc: Follow five women through their glamorous lives with their families in a gated community.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Tequila Truth Serum
programme.desc: Kelly is focused on her future with fiancé Rick, but wonders how long her recently brokered peace with Shannon will last. Elizabeth and Jimmy bond over their shared Mexican heritage.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart becomes 'the face of the FBI' when her popularity botches a mission. When her friend, Miss USA, is kidnapped, Gracie decides to defy her superiors' orders and investigates the case on her own.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oof! I Did It Again
programme.desc: Paget's patience runs out when he's left to pick up the slack after Parsifal crashes into the dock. A new charter of men from Long Island set sail and the crew scramble to meet their loud and incessant demands. Adam goes into beast mode while cooking.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oooof There It Is!
programme.desc: After witnessing the guests having an out-of-control party, Captain Glenn stands his ground and sets limits on this testosterone-filled charter. Madison and Georgia are on different pages as they try to find their own ways to navigate Jenna's demands.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions
programme.desc: Malia, Wes and Adam find themselves in uncharted emotional territory as news of their love triangle spreads below deck. The Oklahomans return as charter guests keeping the interior on their toes as they struggle to keep up with their demanding requests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Malia and Adam share a romantic moment, but complications arise when she continues to flirt with Wes. The charter guests play dirty as they challenge the Sirocco crew to a relay race. Hannah and Adam butt heads again.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ciao, Napoli!
programme.desc: Chef Adam returns to redeem himself while Hannah enters her eighth season in yachting and contemplates settling down. Bosun is quick to establish who's in charge when Joao questions his age and Kasey is sidelined with an illness.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Can I Get Fries With That?
programme.desc: The primary and her guests continue to turn up the heat on the crew causing tension between Adam and Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Sea Was Angry
programme.desc: The Valor crew welcomes aboard a group of psychics and their famous friends, while Ben and Kate have it out over yet another miscommunication. Emily is upset after Ben embarrasses her in front of a charter guest. An unexpected wind storm hits.

programme.title: Below Deck: Jesus Saves
programme.desc: Chris Brown's decision to nap finds him in the crosshairs with Captain Lee. Kate puts her stews through 101 training in order to get them ready for their next charter. The new guests prove to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: Weekend at Brandy's
programme.desc: Last year's primary guests Helen Hoey and Richard Fiore return, but this time, it's their friends who take centre stage. Kevin confronts Simone over a lackluster service experience, while Abbi continues to struggle with consequences looming.

programme.title: Movie: The Book of Life
programme.desc: A young man is in love with a beautiful woman, yet he's torn between following his heart and living up to his family's expectations. He sets out on an adventure that spans three fantastical worlds, armed with his wits, his guitar and two swords.

programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Cryptonite
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when Danny receives an astronomical offer for one of his prized cars. Kevin helps spot an epic flip that brings in a ton of cash, and the guys visit SEMA, the world's biggest and most extravagant auto show.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Really Sweet 16

programme.title: Counting Cars: Employee of the Year

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Money Bike

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cufflinks, Blueberry Turnovers, Dashboards, Pottery
programme.desc: Check out the secrets behind the making of cufflinks, blueberry turnovers, dashboards and pottery.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Sustainable Hotels
programme.desc: Hospitality is important in a world on-the-go, so George sends Jackie to Dubai and Oman to check in and check out the latest uses of Artificial Intelligence and Sustainability in the hotel industry.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chacey Poynter: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: The convicted killer of a Texas firefighter tells her side of the story for the first time.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bruce Beresford- Redman: The Verdict
programme.desc: Former reality television producer Bruce Beresford-Redman was charged with murdering his wife while on a family vacation in Cancun, Mexico. While awaiting trial, he kept a riveting video diary of life inside the Mexican prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: All American Murder: The Rise and Fall of Aaron Hernandez
programme.desc: Best-selling author James Patterson investigates the life and death of convicted murderer and former New England Patriot Aaron Hernandez. It's a fascinating but troubling crime story that explores why such a successful athlete fell so hard from grace.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bruce Beresford- Redman: The Verdict
programme.desc: Former reality television producer Bruce Beresford-Redman was charged with murdering his wife while on a family vacation in Cancun, Mexico. While awaiting trial, he kept a riveting video diary of life inside the Mexican prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Evidence Room
programme.desc: Get an up-close look inside the legal strategy sessions and the creation of cutting-edge animation that happens long before a case hits the courthouse.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Evidence Room
programme.desc: Get an up-close look inside the legal strategy sessions and the creation of cutting-edge animation that happens long before a case hits the courthouse.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peter Chadwick: Caught
programme.desc: A '48 Hours' report helps trip up a wanted fugitive who spent more than four and a half years on the run for allegedly killing his wife and staged a kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The Preacher's Wives
programme.desc: Joy Risker is young, in love and following God's plan when she becomes the second wife of a dynamic Christian Polygamist pastor, Sean Goff - who will go to any length keep Joy's independent streak from threatening his fledgling polygamist flock.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: 20-year-old Steve Bryant thinks he's found his calling among the peaceful, robe-wearing Hare Krishna community. But when he defies a despotic renegade guru, Bryant learns that ultimate devotion has a dark and deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: When a mysterious biker invites single mother Cynthia Garcia to an exclusive party at the Hells Angels clubhouse, she unwittingly enters a secret and dangerous world… with a sacred code that the outlaw bikers would kill to uphold.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Deadly Role Play
programme.desc: Anita Smithey appears trapped in an abusive marriage, until Robert Cline comes along. After a fresh start with his family, Anita seems to feel safe. But she soon reveals a dark side to her new step kids. And the prey becomes the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Caught in Her Crosshairs
programme.desc: After a string of failed relationships, Veronica thinks single dad, Russ, is the answer to her prayers. As long as his daughter, Kimberly, doesn't get in the way. As their family grows, so does this stepmother's rage and everyone is in her crosshairs.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Newlydead
programme.desc: Sharon Nelson wanted it all: love, sex and money. When she sets her sights on a handsome doctor, it doesn't matter that he's married with children. Soon, she carves a devastating path filled with broken hearts, broken dreams and dead bodies.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mile High Monsters
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears outside Denver, an investigation leads police to the home of identical twins Daniel and David DeWild. The brothers claim to know nothing of the crime, but their pact of silence will end when one twin betrays the other.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction
programme.desc: Setting the record straight about the most familiar and beloved stories from U.S. history.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide in a Swamp
programme.desc: Dominic Reddick flees prison and heads to Georgia. Someone calls the cops on him and he escapes to the woods. He eats donuts form the dumpster outside a shop, but to his surprise the cops are waiting inside.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Old and New in Harmony
programme.desc: Roger replaces the concrete front walk with new bluestone design. Architect Michael Kim shows Kevin how he also planned a modern house inside the shell of an old home in Brookline and how modern and traditional live in harmony.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Plaster, Shingles, Radiant Heat
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor meets Vito Bucco, a veteran of the plastering trade. Norm Abram and Tom Silva match the old staggered shingle pattern. Kevin visits interior designers for a sneak peak at the Scandinavian Modern vision. Radiant heat and the boiler go in.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Installing Gutters and a Fireplace
programme.desc: The painters prime the house yellow. The double hung windows on the second floor get elegant, modern detail. Custom copper gutters are formed. The zero-clearance wood burning fireplace is installed. Storage options for the fireplace wall are designed.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Swedish Design Details
programme.desc: Southern yellow pine boards are installed on the ceilings at the bay windows. Cellular PVC boards and a custom railing system and cap are installed on the roof deck. Maple floors are installed from the middle out in case the walls are out of square.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Window Seat, Stairs and a Painted Ceiling
programme.desc: Tom shows Kevin how he's making a window seat fit into a bay window. Norm installs maple stair treads and a custom newel cap from southern yellow pine. In the bedroom, painting contractor Mauro Henrique use a whitewash stain with a lacquer finish.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Drywell, Kitchen Design and Deck Tiles
programme.desc: Lightweight plastic drywells help with water that will come off the roof. The kitchen designer uses cabinetry details and finishes for a Scandinavian-inspired kitchen. A new thermostat learns your habits and preferences. The deck is covered with tiles.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Instead of selling the family home, Brett convinces a son and his mother to restore their Victorian home. Brett knows once he restores their house back to its original glory they will never want to leave their family home of nearly 50 years.

programme.title: Restored: 1960 Post and Beam Modern
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Keeping Morale Up
programme.desc: A new season of builders brave the Alaskan elements to construct off-the-grid cabins. Jeff Erickson takes on a challenging cliffside build, Chappie Cook's team struggles to get materials to the site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Going Vertical
programme.desc: Chappie Cook's team runs into bears and sinking boats while hauling scaffolding materials. Jeff Erickson carefully begins to construct his slippery roof and Chris Sewell works tirelessly to install all the timber walls of his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: People's Choice Awards
programme.desc: Viewers choose the ingredients as bakers compete for a People's Choice Awards showcase.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rob Zombie's Great American Nightmare
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers fight to win over the master of horror himself, Rob Zombie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Be sure to finish all your veggies because we've got the scoop on the best desserts around. Ted Allen, Alton Brown, Giada De Laurentiis and Bobby Flay are sharing their favorite sinful sweets.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolicious
programme.desc: We're getting the inside scoop on all things chocolate. Alton Brown takes a trip to Charleston, S.C., for some heavenly chocolate pudding, while Aaron Sanchez has some not-so-classic New York pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Trick or Eat
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall criss-crosses America to scare up some ghoulishly good grub and tricked-out treats, including mouth-watering zombie burgers in Atlanta, colossal freak shakes in Salem, Mass., and monstrous Franken-chops in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.
